rationale: Section 26.01 is procedural, governing submission and certification of appraisal rolls. It contains no exemption amount or value threshold that would conflict with increasing the homestead exemption in §11.13(b).
quote: By July 25, the chief appraiser shall prepare and certify to the assessor for each taxing unit participating in the district that part of the appraisal roll for the district that lists the property taxable by the unit.
_note: No direct conflict. Note that subsection (a-2) provides provisional roll mechanisms tied to specific 2025 bills (S.B. 4, S.B. 23); a new exemption change may require a similar provisional roll amendment to §26.01, but the existing rule does not block the proposed change.
